biography: Jarkko, affectionately known as "Bailando" among his peers, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing Hirsala Golf with distinction. With a flair for the dramatic and an engaging personality, Jarkko has become a favorite among spectators and fellow competitors alike.

As Jarkko prepares for his tenth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, anticipation is building to see if he can replicate his past successes. His previous victory in the team event, along with a Victor Trophy win, underscores his capability to perform under pressure and his strategic prowess on the course. Each year, Jarkko brings a renewed sense of determination, making him a formidable contender.

Off the course, Jarkko is known for his jovial nature and sportsmanship, often sharing insights and encouragement with other players. His presence enriches the tournament atmosphere, and his commitment to the game makes him an exemplary ambassador for Hirsala Golf. As he steps onto the tee, all eyes will be on Jarkko to see if he can once again capture the coveted Hector Trophée.
